context_notes: Operator posture: full autonomy delegated, Fable max effort. Plan-phase gates pre-resolved this session (do not re-derive): MVP_MODE=true (ROADMAP '**Mode:** mvp'), WALKING_SKELETON=true (phase 01, zero prior summaries — planner must emit SKELETON.md), AI-SPEC gate: no AI keywords in goal (skip), UI gate: HAS_UI=1 no frontend (skip), Nyquist disabled, security enforcement ON (ASVS L1, block on high — plans need <threat_model>), pattern_mapper enabled (PATTERNS.md absent — mapper will spawn; CONTEXT.md+no RESEARCH.md is sufficient input), intel disabled, chunked=false, granularity=coarse, models: researcher=sonnet/planner=inherit/checker=haiku, commit_docs=true, text_mode=false. Phase requirement IDs: CORE-01, CORE-02, CORE-07, ORG-04, MIG-01. Hard scope fence: old routing path (memory-recall.sh, engine search/extract_tokens routing) stays live and untouched; no index compile, no telemetry, no reorg.
